The Court stated that a continuance is needed to obtain an appraisal on the vehicle. Ms. Wenzel stated that the car was in the conservatorship, that it was appraised at $3,000.00, that the trustee used the car during the conservatorship, that he purchased the care for $3,000.00 plus $900.00 and that he is the sole heir. The Court stated that he needed the court's permission to sell the asset and that it needs an appraisal as of the date of sale. The accounting petition was continued to January 11, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Helene Wenzel for Donald Paolino (Trustee).
